title: amaryllis × chelsonii
intro: Amaryllis × chelsonii, also known as Chelone, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Amaryllis × chelsonii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
